title: SentraSuite - SentraRed
description: SentraRed performs adversarial simulations against agent goals, prompts, memory interactions, and tool chains, quantifies exploitability, and delivers validated remediation guidance for secure deployment of autonomous and multi-agent workflows.

items: Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
